meaning: v.脸红,羞愧,呈现红色,使成红色n.脸红,红色,红光
examples: "The most important thing is to be honest," she says, without the trace of a blush.
Even now, the unabashed elite-worshipping that IIT graduates command in India would make Zeus blush.
Vanilla Blush was set up by 33-year-old Nicola Dames after she had major surgery in 2006.
